landing.hero_subtitle: Apply for project financing, track applications, and manage your development portfolio — all in one place.
landing.who_is_desc: This platform is designed for licensed real estate developers in Saudi Arabia who are looking for project financing.
landing.feature_apply_desc: Submit financing applications for your development projects with streamlined digital forms.
landing.feature_track_desc: Monitor the status of your applications in real-time with detailed activity logs.
landing.feature_manage_desc: Oversee all your companies, projects, and team members from a unified dashboard.
absher.verify_subtitle: We need to confirm your identity through Absher (National SSO).
absher.nid_helper: Your national identification or residency number.
absher.will_redirect: You will be redirected to Absher to verify your identity.
absher.otp_subtitle: Enter the one-time password sent to your registered mobile.
absher.otp_helper: Check your Absher-registered mobile for the code.
absher.not_owner_subtitle: You can request the owner to verify on your behalf.
absher.not_owner_desc: Our records show you are not the registered owner of the commercial registration linked to this ID. Only the owner can register the account.
absher.delegate_subtitle: Send the verification link to the company owner.
absher.delegate_desc: Share this link with the company owner. They must complete verification to activate your account.
absher.sms_sent_desc: The owner will receive a verification link shortly.
absher.pending_subtitle: Owner verification is required to proceed.
absher.pending_desc: We are waiting for the company owner to verify their identity. You will be notified once verification is complete.
dashboard.subtitle: Track your financing applications and manage your portfolio.
dashboard.subtitle_new: Let's get your company set up on Safqah.
dashboard.subtitle_single: Complete the onboarding steps to submit your first financing application.
dashboard.get_started_desc: Complete these steps to submit your first financing application.
dashboard.step_profile_desc: Add your personal details and contact information.
dashboard.step_verify_desc: Complete company verification to unlock financing.
dashboard.step_credentials_desc: Share previous credentials and track record.
dashboard.step_project_desc: Create a development project to apply for financing.
dashboard.step_team_desc: Add team members to collaborate on projects and applications.
dashboard.step_financing_desc: Apply for financing on your project.
dashboard.referral_desc: Help us improve by letting us know how you heard about us.
dashboard.notif_termsheet_desc: {{project}} financing term-sheet is ready for your review.
dashboard.notif_signing_desc: {{project}} agreement is ready for digital signature.
companies.title: Companies
company.verify_alert_desc: Complete company verification to unlock financing applications.
company.no_credentials_desc: Share your track record to strengthen financing applications.
projects.title: Projects
project.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.
project.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All project data and financing applications will be permanently removed.
applications.title: Applications
teams.title: Team
teams.invitation_sent_desc: An invitation has been sent. They will receive an email with instructions to join.
teams.role_admin_desc: Full access to all settings and data
teams.role_contributor_desc: Can submit data but not edit others
add_company.title: Register a New Company
add_company.cr_helper: Your company's commercial registration number from the Ministry of Commerce.
add_company.cr_not_found: CR not found or not eligible for financing. Please check the number and try again.
add_company.owner_not_found: This CR is not registered under your National ID. Only the registered owner can add the company.
add_company.delegate_option: Send verification request to the owner
add_project.title: Create a new project
add_project.name_helper: Choose a descriptive name for your development project.
add_project.units_helper: Total number of sellable units in the project.
add_project.building_area_helper: Total built-up area across all floors.
add_project.selling_area_helper: Net sellable area available to buyers.
add_project.period_helper: Estimated duration from start to completion.
add_project.welcome_subtitle: Provide key details so we can match you with the right financing options.
add_application.title: New Financing Application
add_application.select_project_desc: Choose the project you want to apply financing for.
add_application.no_projects: No projects available. Create a project first.
add_application.success_desc: Your financing application has been submitted successfully. We will review it and get back to you.
add_application.next_step_1: Our team will review your project and company details
add_application.next_step_2: You'll receive a term-sheet within 48 hours
add_application.next_step_3: Accept the terms and sign the agreement to proceed
financing.total_cost_helper: Total estimated cost of the project in SAR.
financing.revenue_helper: Estimated total revenue from the project.
financing.need_subtitle: Tell us about your financing requirements so we can match you with the right product.
credentials.title: Previous Credentials
credentials.desc: Share your company track record to strengthen financing applications.
credentials.has_prev: Have you completed previous real estate projects?
credentials.count_helper: Total number of projects you have completed.
credentials.value_helper: Total value of all completed projects.
profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.full_name_helper: Your legal full name as it appears on your ID.
profile.email_helper: Your primary business email for communications.
profile.phone_helper: Your direct phone number with country code.
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details and preferences
team_invite.title: Invite Your Team
team_invite.subtitle: Add team members who will collaborate on projects and financing applications.
offer.title: Term-sheet
offer.accepted_desc: Your financing term-sheet has been accepted. We will proceed with the next steps.
offer.declined_desc: You have declined the financing term-sheet.
submitted.title: Application Status
submitted.action_desc: The review team has requested additional information
submitted.response_desc: Your response has been sent to the review team. Processing will continue shortly.
submitted.ts_preparing_desc: You will be notified when your term-sheet is ready for review.
submitted.info_needed_project: Our review team has requested more details about the project.
submitted.not_approved_project_desc: The project did not meet eligibility criteria at this time.
submitted.not_approved_company_desc: The company did not meet the required criteria.
submitted.info_needed_company: The review team needs more company documentation.
submitted.debt_agreement_desc: Primary financing agreement between issuer and investor
submitted.uhda_agreement_desc: Custody and agency agreement for asset management
submitted.no_action_required: These steps are processed by the Safqah team. No action is required from you.
submitted.deal_launched_desc: Your project is now live on the Safqah platform. Investors can begin participating in this financing opportunity.
submitted.ts_accepted_desc: You accepted the financing term-sheet on {{date}}.
submitted.cancel_reason_3: Terms or timeline don't meet my needs
submitted.cancel_reason_5: Need to update my application details first
activity.title: Activity Log
support.title: Help & Support
support.desc: Need help? Get in touch with our support team.
support.subtitle: Get in touch or find answers to common questions
support.subject: Subject
support.faq_review_a: Company: ~1 day. Project: 1-2 days. Term-sheet within 48h of submission.
support.faq_docs_a: Most data is pulled automatically from government databases. You may need bank statements and project plans.
support.faq_projects_a: Yes! Add unlimited projects under each company.
support.faq_products_a: Land acquisition, development, construction, and bridge financing.
support.faq_credit_q: How is the credit check done?
support.faq_credit_a: Via a licensed credit bureau with your consent during the application process.
support.faq_team_a: Yes, with Admin, Editor, Contributor, or Viewer roles.
not_eligible.title: Not Eligible
not_eligible.desc: This platform is designed for licensed real estate developers in Saudi Arabia.
not_eligible.reason_1: The commercial registration is not classified as a real estate developer
not_eligible.reason_2: The CR is expired or has been suspended by the Ministry of Commerce
not_eligible.reason_3: The entity does not hold a valid RERA developer license
not_eligible.try_different_cr_desc: Check eligibility with another commercial registration number
not_eligible.contact_support_desc: Speak with our team if you believe this is an error
not_eligible.learn_eligibility_desc: Review the requirements for Safqah financing products
not_eligible.data_secure: Your data is secure and has not been stored.
owner_verify.title: Owner Verification
owner_verify.subtitle: Complete this verification to activate the developer account.
owner_verify.success_desc: The developer account has been activated successfully.
invite_accept.title: You're Invited!
invite_accept.desc: You've been invited to join a team on Safqah.
invite_accept.complete_profile: Complete your profile to get started
invite_accept.decline_confirm: Are you sure you want to decline this invitation?
invite_accept.terms_note: By accepting, you agree to the Safqah platform terms.
company_verify.title: Company Verification
company_verify.non_owner_desc: Only registered company owners can complete the verification process. Ask one of the following owners to verify.
company_verify.non_owner_help: They will receive an email with a link to complete the verification.

project_form.selling_area_helper: Net sellable area in square meters

financing_form.product_land_desc: Acquire a land for development purposes

nav.notif_under_review_desc: Your application for Al Noor Residential is now being reviewed by our team.

nav.notif_feedback_desc: Our team has requested additional details about your project timeline.
nav.notif_agreement_desc: Your financing agreement is ready for review and signature.
nav.notif_approved_desc: Congratulations! Your preliminary application has been approved.

submitted.stage_eligibility_desc: Initial check of project eligibility criteria
submitted.stage_execution_desc: Detailed assessment of execution plan and milestones
submitted.stage_exit_desc: Market analysis and exit strategy evaluation
submitted.stage_doc_verify_desc: Verification of corporate documents and licenses
submitted.stage_guarantee_desc: Land pledge and promissory notes verification
submitted.stage_deal_prep_desc: Final deal structuring and listing preparation
submitted.stage_deal_launch_desc: Project goes live on the Safqah platform

submitted.info_bank_desc: Upload a bank statement for the company's primary account from the last 3 months.
submitted.info_timeline_desc: Provide the expected construction start date and estimated completion date for the project.

add_company.delegate_step_3: You'll be notified once verification is complete

add_application.amount_desc: Enter the financing amount you need and see how it compares to your project metrics.

add_application.product_land_desc: Acquire the right land at the right time.
add_application.product_residential_desc: Develop residential communities and contribute to increasing the localization rate.
add_application.product_commercial_desc: Expand the range of projects available, including modern office spaces, retail, and industrial developments.
add_application.product_rawland_desc: Transform raw land; successful investment starts from the ground up.
add_application.product_bridge_desc: Quick, short-term, low-cost financing that protects you from liquidity delays.

owner_verify.request_desc: is requesting Admin access to register and manage financing applications on behalf of your company.
owner_verify.what_this_means_desc: By granting access, this person will be able to submit financing applications, manage projects, and act as an administrator for your company on Safqah.
owner_verify.admin_access_desc: Full access to register financing applications, manage projects, and administer company settings on Safqah.
